content.en:
The first domain.

This is a place where most of the peak Legendary Realm lords can only come, and they can't reach the second realm.

But even the First Dao Domain is a rare treasure for the Peak Legendary Realm Lord.

In the first realm, it is easier to comprehend time and space, but this is only a side benefit, the biggest benefit of the first domain is that it will give birth to some space-time Dao stones, these space-time Dao stones will be randomly bred, and it is difficult to perceive, and can only be seen and touched with the naked eye.

The Space-Time Dao Stone can absorb the time power and space power of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, so that the time power and space power can be fused and turned into the power of time and space control.

Although it is a temporary condensation of space-time control power, if there are enough space-time Dao stones, you can continue to let the peak Legendary Realm lord have the experience of condensing space-time control power in advance, and there is a great hope of becoming a second-level peak Legendary Realm lord in the future.

Therefore, the purpose of many peak Legendary Realm lords coming to the City of Dao Domain is to find the Space-Time Dao Stone.

Whoa!!

One by one, the Peak Legendary Realm Lords scattered and went to find the Space-Time Dao Stone.

"Endless Lord, I'm going to find the Space-Time Dao Stone!"

The Lord of the Word said.

"Go!" Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, the body and clone of the Lord of the Underword went to 963 to find the Temporal Dao Stone.

Ye Tian didn't have much interest in the Time and Space Dao Stone, he was already the third level of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, and the Time and Space Dao Stone didn't help him much.

Therefore, he shuttled towards the Dao Domain City.

Soon, a space-time portal stopped in front of him.

If you want to shuttle into the second realm, you must pass through this gate of time and space, and the peak Legendary Realm lord of the first level cannot shuttle through, which is also a test of strength.

I saw Ye Tian stepping into this gate of time and space, and the dense barriers of time and space were superimposed, turning this void into an endless prison.

Ye Tian cast the Void Touch, and a big purple hand instantly tore through the endless space-time barrier, and immediately shuttled past.

......

The second domain.

Ye Tian came in.

This is an endless land, and in the center of the earth is the city of the Dao Domain, which belongs to the Second Dao Domain.

At this time, not only Ye Tian came in, but the Ice River Lord and the Sword One Lord also came in.

Basically, as long as they are the pinnacle of the second level, the Legendary Realm Lord can enter the second realm.

Regarding the situation in the second realm, Ye Tian also knew a little.

The second realm has a lot of resources, and if you are lucky, you can even obtain resources that are useful to the third-level peak Legendary Realm lords.

Of course, that takes a long time to find

And the real great opportunity of the second realm is three thousand Dao Monuments, each of which contains a great opportunity, a Dao Monument represents a Dao, once this Dao Monument is understood, it is equivalent to Jing Zhengmalaria controlling a Dao.

Among them, the most valuable are the Time Dao Monument and the Space Dao Monument.

Although the Peak Legendary Realm Lord has already controlled time and space, if he goes to comprehend the Time Dao Monument and the Space Dao Monument, he will still have a great harvest, which will help him to create the supreme technique of time and space.

Therefore, many second-level peak Legendary Realm lords came to this second realm to comprehend the Time Dao Monument and the Space Dao Monument, if they could create the space-time supreme technique with the help of the Time Dao Monument and the Space Dao Monument, then they could break through to the third level.

One can imagine what a chance it was to be able to enter the second realm.

And if you want to enter the third realm, you don't have to reach the peak of your strength and you can enter the third level of the Legendary Realm Lord, but you need to understand the ten Dao Monuments.

In short, the greater the number of Dao monuments comprehended, the more benefits there will be.

However, Ye Tian is not clear about the specific benefits he will get.

"Let's go to the Time Dao Monument first!"

Ye Tian quickly came to the Time Dao Monument, and the Ice River Lord was also here to comprehend.

Ye Tian and the Ice River Lord glanced at each other, nodded, and did not communicate much.

At this time, the most important thing is to comprehend the time monument.

Ye Tian was here to comprehend, and soon thoroughly understood the mystery on the Time Dao Monument, and he had a little connection with the Time Dao Monument.

At this time, he could still feel that the Time Dao Monument was of great help to him, and if he comprehended the Creation of Time Supreme Technique here, the efficiency would be many times higher.

However, Ye Tian gave up.

He left the Time Dao Monument and went to the Space Dao Monument.

After a while, Ye Tian once again understood the Space Dao Monument and had a connection with the Space Dao Monument.

Subsequently, Ye Tian came to the Sword Dao Monument.

There is also a peak Legendary Realm Lord here, a sword and a lord!

The Sword One Lord is the peak Legendary Realm Lord of the Heavenly Sword Clan, Ye Tian once went to the Heavenly Sword Clan, and copied the Heavenly Sword Clan's kendo talent.

However, the Sword One Lord was single-mindedly contemplating the Sword Dao Dao Monument, so he didn't pay attention to Ye Tian's arrival at all.

After Ye Tian understood the Sword Dao Dao Monument, he went to other Dao Monuments.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian understood one Dao Monument after another, and soon comprehended ten Dao Monuments.

At this time, he sensed that he could enter the third realm.

He could easily tear through the shackles of the underworld and enter the Third Realm, but he didn't go to the Third Realm immediately.

He continued to comprehend these Taoist monuments, and for him, this was also an opportunity.

If he uses the Dao Monument here, he should hope to raise the number of Dao he controls to more than a hundred, which will help him improve his strength in the future and stabilize his foundation.

He has a lot of Legendary Realm Ancestral Endowments, but unfortunately it takes too long to control each Dao, and his years of cultivation are still short after all, so there is no way to control too many Daos

However, these Dao Monuments would allow him to control them more quickly, so he wanted to seize this opportunity.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had already controlled dozens of Dao.

This time, Ye Tian came to the Shadow Dao Monument, and he did not control the Shadow Dao.

Therefore, he began to continuously comprehend the Shadow Dao Monument, and he also had the Shadow Legend-level Ancestral Endowment, and the Shadow Dao Monument was comprehended, and the speed of progress was extremely fast.

Time passed slowly, and finally on this day, Ye Tian successfully mastered the path of shadows.

In this way, with the help of these Dao monuments, Ye Tian controlled more and more Dao.

Sixty roads!

Seventy Roads!

Eighty roads!

......

The opening time of the Dao Domain City is ten eternal epochs, and once the ten eternal epochs have passed, the Dao Domain City will be hidden again, and Ye Tian and other peak Legendary Realm lords will be kicked out.

Ye Tian also wanted to enter the third realm immediately, but the Dao Monument of the second realm also helped him a lot, so he didn't know how to choose.

"For the last five eternal eras, I must enter the third realm, and I can't waste too much time in the second realm. "

Ye Tian planned.

When the five eternal epochs were about to pass, Ye Tian controlled the hundredth path.

And at this time, the mutation protruded. _
